barRaise.topFinding: Nineteenth review: the stall broke. The two-day pile-up the 06-13 review flagged is committed (2214593, 0d2f72f, f4bbbd1): the web+yac boot route and the 0.51.3 catch-up changelog entry shipped, the FUSE-truncated app.js was restored, and the working tree is clean except one trivial CLAUDE.md doc edit. The lone HIGH is unchanged and Nick-gated: the partial 'Yes& Chains' brand rename, where user-visible surfaces (README.md, manifest.json, src/legal-view.ts) say 'Yes& Chains' while PROJECT_SPEC.md (3x), CLAUDE.md (4x) and the locked BACKLOG section 1.8 still say 'YesAndChains', with no superseding decision in DECISIONS_NEEDED.md. The paper trail around it is now fully closed (CONTEXT 0.51.3 entry + queue item yac-brand-string-reconcile), so the AI side is done. Verdict holds at needs-attention on that one HIGH, but the discipline trend reversed, so the at-risk slide the last review warned about did not happen. Two MEDIUM self-inflicted reporting drifts remain the AI can fix without a decision: the dashboard audit block reads 0/0/0 two days stale over a standing HIGH, and the dashboard claims version 0.51.3 while the repo is still 0.51.2.
